reviews.review_msg: The depth of hermeneutics is fundamentally and tacitly reciprocal. As Ames (“Meaning as Imaging”) indicates, the images offered in his teaching can later percolate in different forms, allowing us to re-cognize them phenomenologically. He embodies a beautiful, holistic way of teaching.

Took this class last year. A great class to take if you want your insomnia cured or interested in the paranormal pseudoscience

The textbook is a better teacher and has concise information albeit from an American context.
